case_title: TODD KAHL VS. WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY KAHL, TODD AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAHL, TODD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ERNESTO COVARRUBIAS - BUSINESS MANAGER, SHILPI PATEL - MANAGING DENTIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC.
